seoTitle: Maylands vs McCallum — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maylands and McCallum. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maylands and McCallum.
heading: Maylands vs McCallum — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maylands, South Australia and McCallum, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: McCallum has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Maylands (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maylands or McCallum safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maylands has a flood risk score of 41/100, while McCallum scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maylands scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. McCallum scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maylands or McCallum?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. McCallum has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
